texto: The work that must be done for each woman to reconnect with her psyche and to give herself a chance to live her own life is essentially the same. The realization of the equality of all races, the equality of all beings is essential.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Betty Buckley sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “The work that must be done for each woman to reconnect with her psyche and to give herself a chan…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, work, woman, útil em momentos de trabalho e work.
